name: Addition Financial
description_short: Addition Financial is a credit union established in 1937 offering traditional banking services including checking, savings, loans, and financial education through its Sanford, Florida branch.
description_long:
Addition Financial Credit Union was established in 1937 and operates as a member-owned financial cooperative. The organization maintains a physical branch location in Sanford, Florida at 101 E 25th Street, serving the local community with traditional credit union services. As a federally chartered credit union (Charter Number 68702), it operates under standard credit union regulations and member governance structures.

Addition Financial offers a comprehensive suite of banking products and services including checking and savings accounts, certificates of deposit (CDs), money market accounts, and IRA/KEOGH retirement accounts. The credit union provides lending services such as auto loans, personal loans, and business banking options. Members can access online banking, mobile app services, bill pay, wire transfers, remote deposit capture, and electronic statements. Additional services include drive-thru teller access, cashier's checks, money orders, and financial tools like calculators for savings, auto loans, mortgages, and credit card payoff planning.

Addition Financial distinguishes itself through member-focused financial education and community support. The institution offers financial counseling, financial education programs, financial workshops, and student scholarships to members. The credit union maintains extended hours including Saturday morning service (9 AM - 1 PM) and provides multiple contact channels including a toll-free phone line (800-771-9411). Their routing number is 263181384, and they offer service status tracking for online banking, mobile apps, and physical branch operations.

The Sanford branch maintains average member satisfaction with a rating of 2.3/5 stars based on three reviews. While members praise individual staff members for patience and informativeness, concerns have been raised about customer service responsiveness, accessibility policies, employee turnover, and communication practices. As a smaller credit union branch rather than a full-service multi-location institution, member experience may vary based on branch staffing and operational capacity. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: Mobile banking and remote deposit capture
pros: Established 1937 — long-standing financial institution with 80+ years operating history
Comprehensive financial education — offers financial counseling, workshops, and financial education programs
Extended Saturday hours — open 9 AM-1 PM Saturday for members needing weekend access
Toll-free support — 800-771-9411 number provides accessible customer service beyond branch hours
Full-service credit union — offers checking, savings, CDs, IRAs, auto loans, personal loans, and business banking
Member scholarships — provides student scholarship programs supporting community members
Online and mobile banking — offers remote deposit capture, e-statements, bill pay, and mobile payments
cons: Low member satisfaction rating — 2.3/5 stars with complaints about service quality and employee turnover
Customer service issues — reviews mention staff hanging up on members and difficulty reaching support
Limited accessibility — members report being required to visit branch in person for account modifications
Small branch operation — single Sanford location limits geographic convenience for wider service area
Service communication problems — reviews indicate staff giving inconsistent or unclear information about policies
best_for: Sanford, Florida residents seeking local credit union banking with community ties
Members prioritizing financial education and personal financial counseling services
Borrowers seeking auto loans or personal loans from a member-owned cooperative structure
diagnosis: Addition Financial is best for Sanford-area residents and local business owners seeking traditional credit union banking with an emphasis on financial education and community involvement. However, prospective members should be aware of the 2.3/5 member satisfaction rating and documented customer service concerns before opening an account, particularly if they value responsive phone support or branch accessibility.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
